title: String Concatenation
subtitle: Joining strings together
goal: Learn how to join text strings using the + operator.
explanation: String concatenation means combining several strings into one.
The + operator is used for this.
JavaScript simply attaches the text one piece after another.
If you need a space between words, you must add it yourself.
Joining strings is often used to build messages, titles, and text content.

analogy.title: Analogy
analogy.text: Imagine two train cars. Coupling them together gives you one longer train. JavaScript joins several strings the same way.

remember: The result is one new string.

mistake.title: Common mistake
mistake.text: Beginners often forget to add a space between words and get HelloWorld instead of Hello World.
